title: Craftable Ominous Bottle Recipe
body:
# Craftable Ominous Bottle

**Raid Power, No Pillager Required**

Ominous bottles are your ticket to triggering raids — but in vanilla Minecraft, you need to hunt down a patrol, survive the fight, and hope the captain drops one. This datapack skips the grind and lets you craft the bottle directly, so you can start farming totems on your terms.

Note: “Ominous Bottle Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack. If you are interested in more datapacks, check out the links at the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better**

Because raid farming shouldn’t depend on random patrols. Whether you're building a totem farm, testing defenses, or just want Bad Omen on demand, this pack gives you full control without the hassle.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip

2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder

3. Type /reload in-game

4. Start crafting your ominous bottle and summon raids whenever you want
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
